name: alterlab-molfeat
description: Featurizes molecules for machine learning with molfeat (100+ featurizers) — ECFP/MACCS/MAP4 fingerprints, RDKit and Mordred physicochemical descriptors, and pretrained embeddings (ChemBERTa, ChemGPT, GIN) exposed as scikit-learn transformers that convert SMILES into feature vectors. Use when turning molecules into ML-ready feature matrices for QSAR/QSPR or virtual screening, or benchmarking fingerprint against descriptor and embedding representations; for training models and MoleculeNet benchmar
author: AlterLab-IEU
